name: Thomas H. Ringler
revenue: $1.2M-$6.3M (family-owned since 1989, 30+ years in Orlando)

name: Justin Solitro
revenue: <$5M (15+ years industry experience as structural engineer and PE)
icebreaker: "As a licensed Professional Engineer and UCF graduate, you bring a rare engineering rigor to roofing - I'd love to hear how that shapes your approach to roof system design."

industry: Roofing (also HVAC via Sunflo Cooling division)

name: Mathew Appell
revenue: $1M-$5M (20+ years in Florida, completed 1,300+ client projects)
icebreaker: "Your team has done custom work for Adriatico Trattoria and Stonewood Grill Tavern in Orlando - how did you transition from restaurant construction to becoming one of Florida's fastest-growing roofing companies?"

name: Jack Porter
revenue: $1M-$5M (20+ years experience, 2,300+ completed projects across Florida)
icebreaker: "With over 2,300 projects completed across Florida and 20+ years in the industry, Align Roofing has clearly built something special in the Orlando market."

name: Joe Rudd
revenue: ~$1.5M (estimates range $1.2M-$1.5M, family-owned since 2001)
icebreaker: "You've been in the AC industry since 1976 and self-employed since 2001 - and you still find time to ride your Harley and raise money for Shriners Hospitals. That's the kind of well-rounded business owner people want to work with."

name: Chris Elsis
revenue: ~$1.8M ($150K/month reported before fake website disruption in 2024-2025)
icebreaker: "I read about how AI-generated fake websites devastated your business last year - you went from $150K/month to having to sell vans. How are you fighting back against those scam sites?"

name: Chris Graff
revenue: $1M-$5M (third-generation family business founded in 1989)
website: Not found - search "Florida Heat and Air Orlando"

name: Patrick Ziegler

icebreaker: "You've been serving Orlando since 1984 - that's four decades of keeping Central Florida cool. Phil Kean Design Group has been a partner for over 10 years, which speaks volumes about your reputation."

name: Justin Konforte

name: Joe Strada
revenue: $16.4M (slightly over range, but family-owned with $1M-$5M per division likely)

name: Ron Scott
revenue: $1M-$5M (family-owned since 2004, <$5M per ZoomInfo)

name: Mohsen Jebailey

name: Tim O'Brien
revenue: $1M-$5M (established, 179+ reviews, 5-star rated)
